dialogue.en: You said 'I'm going to the hospital today', I thought you were sick.
dialogue.lit: you say I today will go hospital, I assumed you sick PFV
dialogue.r: Nǐ shuō 'wǒ jīntiān yào qù yīyuàn', wǒ yǐwéi nǐ shēngbìng le.

dialogue.t: —哈哈，对不起，搞错了！意思是我去看安。
dialogue.en: Haha, sorry, I mixed it up! I meant I'm going to visit Ān.
dialogue.lit: haha sorry mess-up wrong PFV, meaning is I go see Ān
dialogue.r: Hāhā, duìbuqǐ, gǎo cuò le! Yìsi shì wǒ qù kàn Ān.

dialogue.t: —安在医院工作，对吧？
dialogue.en: Ān works at the hospital, right?

dialogue.r: Ān zài yīyuàn gōngzuò, duì ba?

dialogue.t: —对！她现在是那儿的护士。我其实是去找她吃午饭。
dialogue.en: Right! She's a nurse there now. I was actually going to meet her for lunch.
dialogue.lit: correct, she now is there MOD nurse, I actually am go find her eat lunch
dialogue.r: Duì! Tā xiànzài shì nàr de hùshi. Wǒ qíshí shì qù zhǎo tā chī wǔfàn.

dialogue.t: —笑死了，我都准备给你打电话了。
dialogue.en: I'm dying laughing, I was even getting ready to call you.
dialogue.lit: laugh dead PFV, I even prepared for you make phone-call PFV
dialogue.r: Xiào sǐ le, wǒ dōu zhǔnbèi gěi nǐ dǎ diànhuà le.

dialogue.t: —下次我说清楚一点，再也不让你误会了。
dialogue.en: Next time I'll explain more clearly, I won't let you misunderstand again.
dialogue.lit: next-time I speak clear a-bit, again also not let you misunderstand PFV
dialogue.r: Xiàcì wǒ shuō qīngchu yìdiǎn, zài yě bú ràng nǐ wùhuì le.

dialogue.t: —没事，挺有意思的，哈哈。
dialogue.en: It's fine, it was pretty funny actually, haha.
dialogue.lit: no-matter, quite have meaning MOD, haha
dialogue.r: Méishì, tǐng yǒu yìsi de, hāhā.

yourTurn.t: 你的短信我看错了，吓死我了！

yourTurn.t: 对不起，搞错了！

dialogue.lit: Chén Jié, hello, I am Lín, Wěi MOD friend

dialogue.en: Hello, Lín! Nice to meet you, feel free to come by often.
dialogue.lit: hello Lín, very happy know you, welcome often come

dialogue.t: —陈杰以前做过这个工作吗？
dialogue.en: Has Chén Jié done this kind of work before?
dialogue.lit: Chén Jié before do EXP this MW work QP
dialogue.r: Chén Jié yǐqián zuò guo zhè ge gōngzuò ma?

dialogue.t: —做过，他有五年的经验，比我厉害多了。
dialogue.en: Yes, he has five years of experience, way more impressive than me.
dialogue.lit: do EXP, he has five year MOD experience, compare-to me impressive much PFV
dialogue.r: Zuò guo, tā yǒu wǔ nián de jīngyàn, bǐ wǒ lìhai duō le.

dialogue.t: —哪里哪里，互相学习，互相学习。
dialogue.en: Oh come on, we learn from each other.
dialogue.lit: where where, mutually study, mutually study
dialogue.r: Nǎli nǎli, hùxiāng xuéxí, hùxiāng xuéxí.

dialogue.en: Can I come ask for your advice later if I have questions?
dialogue.lit: later have question can request-teaching you QP
dialogue.r: Yǐhòu yǒu wèntí kěyǐ qǐngjiào nǐ ma?

dialogue.t: —当然可以，随时欢迎！
dialogue.en: Of course you can, anytime!
dialogue.lit: of-course can, anytime welcome

yourTurn.t: 那位新来的是谁？

yourTurn.t: 很高兴认识你，欢迎常来。

dialogue.t: —这个周末我们去爬山吧，天气这么好。
dialogue.en: Let's go hiking this weekend, the weather is so nice.
dialogue.lit: this MW weekend we go climb-mountain right, weather this-way good

dialogue.en: Sounds good! Ān wants to go too, she says she's never been hiking before.

dialogue.r: Hǎo a! Ān yě xiǎng qù, tā shuō tā cónglái méi pá guo shān.

dialogue.t: —那太好了，我们早上八点出发，怎么样？

dialogue.lit: okay, remember bring water and a-little eat MOD

dialogue.lit: (climb to half) tired dead PFV, rest a-bit right

dialogue.t: —好，喝点水。马可，你怎么还不累？

dialogue.lit: good, drink some water, Marco, you how still not tired

dialogue.t: —因为我每天都运动，所以爬山对我来说不难。

dialogue.t: —值得！下次还要一起来。
